title: Fresh Vanilla!
description: This is a texture pack for people that wants a minecraft more immersive
body:
![Fresh Edition!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dc2a03544f5dcfea2d503603b84c9addf6408a93.png)

# Fresh Vanilla!

This pack makes Minecraft more fresh!
It contains a tiny remake of some minecraft textures and are very good for survival
with some animated sprites!
If something like this is what are you searching you will this texture pack
## Features
- Animated Sprites
  
- New Paintings
  
- Legacy TU69 Panorama
  
- Refreshing Textures
  
## Screenshots
![Old Fish Texture](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2bca28712b5fa11b1827f4ef5b97723de6d9154c.png)

![Big Helmets](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ee8fefbfa5f084c83152879c42888b8ba1b30439.png)

There are not too many remade textures but
if you download i will appreciate it!
I will upload some versions to see how its going the texture pack

This is going to be a full remake of textures in the future

## About Pemissions

If you want to use it on your modpack, you're free to do it but put credits on it.

You can use it on videos on youtube but with credits on it

Enjoy!   
-Flecish
